description_long: This rifle features a compact, modern design with a dark brown upper receiver and a matte black lower frame. The stock is skeletonized and adjustable, providing both stability and reduced weight, while the pistol grip and foregrip are ergonomically shaped for improved handling. The top of the rifle is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and basic iron sights are present. The barrel is short and robust, ending with a small muzzle device. The magazine is not visible, suggesting it may be integrated or omitted in this depiction. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components for weight reduction and durability.
description: A compact, modern rifle with a skeletonized adjustable stock, ergonomic grips, and a short barrel, finished in dark brown and black. It features a full-length Picatinny rail and basic iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skeletonized adjustable stock, ergonomic pistol grip, and the full-length Picatinny rail on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, muzzle device, and the alignment of the Picatinny rail and iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same skeletonized stock and ergonomic features, with the foregrip and barrel clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure and the alignment of the upper receiver and rail.
